title: Section 14
content: The Governor of Bombay in Council, under the general control of the Governor General of India in Council, may appoint one or more Assistants to the District Judge, and may suspend or remove from his appointment any Assistant so appointed. 1 * * * * *
footnote: 1. The second paragraph of section 14 rep. by Act 12 of 1876, s. 1 and Schedule, Part I (w.e.f. 11-4-1876).
